sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The EventGNN class, implemented in Cython, is a specialized event template within the AnalysisG framework, designed to handle data specific to Graph Neural Network (GNN) applications. It inherits from the generic EventTemplate class, extending its functionalities to incorporate features and structures relevant for GNN processing. This class provides a high-performance interface to an underlying C++ event object tailored for GNN-based analyses.

sect1.title: The EventGNN Class
sect1.para: EventGNN is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. It inherits from EventTemplate, thereby gaining all the base functionalities for event indexing, weighting, and tree/branch management. Its primary role is to encapsulate a C++ gnn_event object, which likely contains specific data members and methods pertinent to GNN events.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes a new C++ gnn_event object and assigns its pointer to self.ev. It then upcasts self.ev to an event_template* and assigns it to self.ptr, allowing EventGNN to be treated as a generic EventTemplate while still managing its specialized C++ object.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer. This method is intentionally left empty, as initialization logic is handled by __cinit__ and the underlying C++ object.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. It deallocates the C++ gnn_event object pointed to by self.ev, ensuring proper memory management for the specialized event data. Note that self.ptr is not directly deleted here, as it points to self.ev.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The EventGNN class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class EventGNN: Declares EventGNN as a Cython extension type.
cdef gnn_event *ev: A C++ pointer to a gnn_event object, which is the specialized C++ representation of a GNN event.
self.ptr = <event_template*>(self.ev): This line demonstrates C++ upcasting, where a pointer to a derived class (gnn_event) is assigned to a pointer to its base class (event_template). This allows EventGNN to fulfill the EventTemplate interface while internally managing its specific gnn_event data.
from AnalysisG.core.event_template cimport EventTemplate: Imports the base EventTemplate class, from which EventGNN inherits.
from AnalysisG.events.gnn.event_gnn cimport *: Imports the C++ gnn_event class declaration from its .pxd file.
